evidence: TASK-034 (FEAT-006 T1) verified. Reflected surface:use op `update` (commit c125c33): updateContext(cwd,{dryRun}) consults checkStatus per installed schema and routes by drift — in-sync no-op; catalog-ahead resync via the existing resyncSchema (re-fingerprinting only resynced+migrated baselines, never on dryRun); locally-modified/both-diverged refuse-and-report (no overwrite); no-baseline/missing-* reported. installContext + /context install + cli.ts byte-unchanged. Runtime demo via the real CLI on a throwaway copy of .context with tasks.schema.json hand-edited to locally-modified: `pi-context update --dryRun` and `pi-context update` both reported refused:[tasks] + the other 15 inSync, and the tasks schema bytes were identical after the real run (no clobber); --dryRun snapshot showed every substrate file byte-identical (writes nothing). Fresh-context adversarial probe: PASS, no defects (both-diverged handled; baseline-refresh surgical + correct; dryRun writes nothing by independent byte-snapshot; op reflected, not in INTENTIONALLY_UNEXPOSED_WRITERS; build+check+test fail 0; new updateContext + resolveOp('update') + parseOpArgs --dryRun tests pass). The merged-of-locally-modified is deferred to TASK-036.
